title: ListJobsResult
description: ListJobsResult schema from Amazon Snow Family API

allOf.description: Each JobListEntry object contains a job's state, a job's ID, and a value that indicates whether the job is a job part, in the case of export jobs.
HTTP requests are stateless. If you use this automatically generated NextToken value in your next ListJobs call, your returned JobListEntry objects will start from this point in the array.
